title: perfoliata rotundifolia
intro: Perfoliata rotundifolia, also known as the sweet cicely or sweet cicelery, is a biennial plant native to Europe, Asia, and North America. The medicinal properties of this plant are derived from its roots, seeds, and leaves, which have been used to treat various health conditions due to their antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and carminative properties. The health benefits of sweet cicely include its ability to ease digestive issues, reduce menstrual cramps, and lower blood pressure, among others. Sweet cicely can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in cooking as a sweetener and flavor enhancer, particularly in traditional European and Asian herbal remedies.
